titleStmt.title: SII 27.114: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 114. (A.R. No. 320 of 1931-32.) KUDI (No. 34), UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in Survey No. 97.
It registers a gift of land, after purchase from Nāraṇa-kaṇañja, for worship and offerings to god Śaṅkaranārāyaṇadēva of Koḍuge, by Toḷaha when Aṇṇappa-voḍeya was governing Bārakūru-rājya.

It is dated Śaka 1360, Piṅgaḷa, Mā śu. 5, Thursday. The letter Mā is an abbreviation for either the month of Mārgaśirsha or Māgha. In the given cyclic year the tithi corresponds regularly with the weekday only in the month of Māgha, which, therefore, may be taken as the month intended. The details correspond to 1438 A.D., January 30, the Śaka year being current.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇapatayēnamaḥ śrī sarasvateye namaḥ śrī gurubhyō
nama nirvirghnamastu navastuṁga śirastuṁga caṁdra cāmara cāravē
trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhamē śrī jayūbhyudaya
sakha varuśa 1360 neya piṁgaḷa saṁvatsarada mā śu 5 gu śrī maṁ mahārājā
dhirāja paramēśvara pūrvapaścima dakṣiṇa śrīvīra pratāpa dēvarā
yara nirupadiṁ Aṁṇappa voḍeyaru bārakūra rājyava pratipā
lisuva kāladalū sūlaṇigaṁba toḷahara kāladalū kumūra vrittiya bā
ṇaṁcara kāladalū haḷiya bāṇati sāvaṁtiya maga koḍusara sāvaṁta
kasakaṇaṁjatana maga nāraṇa kaṇaṁja Avana kayiyiṁda naḍuvaṇa gaḍiyiṁ ba
yala gade nāka voḷage nāgaṁḍugadalū 2 ḍu mūḍe bittuva bāḷa mū
lava koṁḍu A bāḷa mēle saṁkharanārāyaṇa dēvarige Amrutapaḍige koṭa
Akki nāgaṁḍugadalū 5 mūḍe Akki ha kaṭaḷeyanū seya
ya saṁkara nārayaṇa dēvariga Amrutapaḍige dhūpake dhārāpūrva kavāgi
mūlavaneṟadanu A bāḷa mēle toḷaharu tamma
nā Akkiya kā ṭavaraha mattahaḷa mūḍida
tōḍana keyiṁ
gade nākaṁ ḷage yeppattu hāne bittuva Oyalanu koṁḍu
ta mūlavakoṁḍu Abāḷamēle koḍugeya saṁkara
nārāyaṇa dēvarige Amrutapaḍige nāgaṁḍugadalu Akki naḍa
va hāṁge kaṭṭaḷeya māḍi mūlavaneṟadanu A bhāḷa mēle
damaged
karavara bhatta Anāya sanāya
nyavāgi toḷaharu beṁma
nu nāraṇa kaṇaṁjata nāyaru mūlavāgi
hāneyali koḍageya saṁkharanārāyaṇa dēvarige Amrutapaḍige
dali 10 mū Akkiyanū kālakālakke naḍasi bahanu . Oṁdu kāla A
kiya naḍasa tīrade Uḷiteṁdare nāraṇa kaṇaṁjatanāyaru mū
lareṁdu hēḷūdu salla yiṁtappudake sākṣi bara
rāḷuva saṁkhara kaṇaṁjatano Oppakoṁ ḍu baradāta saṁkarasena
bōva toḷahara Oppa mahadēvaru beṁmaṇaṁcara Oppa mahadēva
ru koḍusara savaṁtana Oppa haḷa
yi sara sāvaṁtana saṁ rada Oppa hoṁna beraḷidēvisākṣi
ppa hoṁna beraḷi dēvi hoṁna beraḷidēvi Oḍupina mahādēva
rā mahādēvaru . dānapālana yō rmadhyē dānāśrēyōnu
pālanaṁ dānāsvarggamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ .
haḷiya O vara Oppa śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.114 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
